source_system.description: Entirely synthetic fixture for internal Chat-Mine producer alignment.

messages.content: Synthetic Example Project has a test deployment proposed for Friday at 14:00 UTC. Keep the example rollback checklist in the operations wiki.
Noted. I will preserve Friday at 14:00 UTC as a synthetic proposal and retain the example rollback checklist request.
A synthetic older note says the test deployment is Thursday. Do not choose between the two example dates.

manifest_candidates.source_quote: Synthetic Example Project has a test deployment proposed for Friday at 14:00 UTC.
manifest_candidates.suggested_summary: Synthetic Example Project has a test deployment proposed for Friday at 14:00 UTC.
manifest_candidates.suggested_content: Synthetic Example Project has a test deployment proposed for Friday at 14:00 UTC.

manifest_candidates.source_quote: A synthetic older note says the test deployment is Thursday.
manifest_candidates.suggested_summary: A synthetic older note conflicts with the example Friday deployment proposal.
manifest_candidates.suggested_content: A synthetic older note says the test deployment is Thursday.
manifest_candidates.review_notes: Conflict is preserved for human review; the exporter does not choose a winner.

cutover_probes.prompt: What is the proposed Example Project deployment time?
cutover_probes.expected_behavior: Return Friday at 14:00 UTC as a reviewed proposal with source evidence.

cutover_probes.prompt: Who approved the Example Project deployment?
cutover_probes.expected_behavior: State that the export does not identify an approver.

cutover_probes.prompt: Which day is Example Project deploying?
cutover_probes.expected_behavior: Surface the Friday and Thursday conflict without silently resolving it.

cutover_probes.prompt: Is the older Thursday deployment note authoritative?
cutover_probes.expected_behavior: Do not present the older Thursday note as current confirmed state.

cutover_probes.prompt: Show the source evidence for the Example Project deployment schedule.
cutover_probes.expected_behavior: Return the supporting chat spans and expose the unresolved conflict.
